reflection_result.reflection_reasoning: The tap on the '30' minute mark resulted in the correct update of both the analog dial and the digital time display, confirming that the action was executed properly.

tasks: set an alarm at 12:30 pm every Friday and Sunday, disable the vibration

actions.description: Tap the "F" button to select Friday as a repeat day.

reflection_result.interface_changes: The 'F' button for Friday is now highlighted, indicating it has been selected as a repeat day. The alarm label changed from 'Tomorrow' to 'Friday', reflecting the updated repeat day.
reflection_result.expected_vs_actual: The goal of selecting Friday as a repeat day was achieved successfully. The UI reflects that Friday is now active for this alarm.
reflection_result.abnormal_states: No errors or abnormal states detected. The UI behaves as expected.
reflection_result.improvement_suggestions: No improvements needed. The action was successful and no further steps are required.
reflection_result.reflection_reasoning: The action was to tap the 'F' button to select Friday. After execution, the 'F' button is highlighted, and the alarm's repeat day is updated to 'Friday'. This confirms the action was executed correctly and the system responded as intended.

tasks: set an alarm at 12:30 pm every Friday and Sunday, disable the vibration

actions.description: Tap the "S" button to select Sunday as a repeat day.

reflection_result.interface_changes: The 'S' button for Sunday is now highlighted in blue, indicating it has been selected as a repeat day. The text above the days now shows 'Sun, Fri' instead of just 'Fri'.
reflection_result.expected_vs_actual: The goal of selecting Sunday as a repeat day was successfully achieved, as evidenced by the visual feedback showing Sunday as active.
reflection_result.abnormal_states: No errors or abnormal UI states detected.
reflection_result.improvement_suggestions: No improvements needed. The action was successful and no further steps are required.
reflection_result.reflection_reasoning: The tap on the 'S' button resulted in the expected visual change: Sunday is now highlighted and included in the repeat days list. This confirms that the action was correctly executed and the UI responded appropriately.

tasks: set an alarm at 12:30 pm every Friday and Sunday, disable the vibration

actions.description: Tap the "Vibrate" toggle to disable vibration for the alarm.

reflection_result.interface_changes: The 'Vibrate' toggle has changed from enabled (blue checkmark) to disabled (empty circle).
reflection_result.expected_vs_actual: The goal of disabling vibration for the alarm was achieved successfully.
reflection_result.abnormal_states: No errors or abnormal UI states detected.
reflection_result.improvement_suggestions: None needed; the action was executed correctly.
reflection_result.reflection_reasoning: The action was to tap the 'Vibrate' toggle to disable it. The UI state after execution shows that the toggle is now in the off position, indicating successful execution.
